cnbc.title: SpaceX confidentially files for IPO, setting stage for record offering
cnbc.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX is reportedly targeting a valuation of around $1.75 trillion in its forthcoming IPO.

cnbc.title: TSA shutdown: GOP leaders Thune and Johnson boost two-track approach to funding DHS
cnbc.summary: Funding for the Department of Homeland Security — including the TSA — lapsed in February, over Democratic concerns about the agency's immigration enforcement.

cnbc.title: Trump calls U.S. 'STUPID' for birthright citizenship after attending Supreme Court arguments
cnbc.summary: Trump's executive order says babies born in the U.S. are not entitled to citizenship if their parents are illegal immigrants or undocumented workers.

cnbc.title: Trump admin tells Supreme Court birth tourism is evidence birthright citizenship needs to end
cnbc.summary: "Birth tourism" is the practice of pregnant women traveling to the U.S. with the intention of giving birth and obtaining U.S. citizenship for their child.

cnbc.title: Eli Lilly opposes push to pass Trump's drug pricing deals into law, CEO says
cnbc.summary: Eli Lilly opposes the White House's push to codify "most favored nation" drug pricing into law, CEO Dave Ricks said in an interview with CNBC.

cnbc.title: Iran's war propaganda homes in on Trump with Lego memes
cnbc.summary: Iranian propaganda is also homing in on the war's destabilizing impact on the global economy and energy prices, which have shot up in the U.S.

cnbc.title: Pete Hegseth lifts suspension of Kid Rock Army helicopter flyby crews after Trump comments
cnbc.summary: Kid Rock is a prominent supporter of President Donald Trump and performed at the 2024 Republican National Convention.

cnbc.title: Stock market is in for 'choppy, bumpy ride' in 2026, strategist says. Why it pays to stay invested
cnbc.summary: The market's worst days are often followed by the best days, according to JPMorgan Asset Management data. Investors who stay the course stand to gain the most.

cnbc.title: Trump is paying TSA agents — but where is the money coming from?
cnbc.summary: President Donald Trump has said he is drawing from unspent funds in last year's tax and spending bill to pay TSA agents.

cnbc.title: Walmart-owned Sam's Club raises its annual membership fee to $60
cnbc.summary: Sam's Club is hiking membership fees as its annual sales and membership grow and as high gas prices call attention to one of its key perks.
